## Discussion

You use this tag to set or get a value of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAFPServerSignature] that represents the server signature block. This is unique to AppleShare password attributes.

# SecItemAttr.signatureItemAttr

**Case**

Identifies the server signature attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
case signatureItemAttr
```

## Discussion

You use this tag to set or get a value of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAFPServerSignature] that represents the server signature block. This is unique to AppleShare password attributes.
title: SecItemAttr.signatureItemAttr
